title.tr: SMART Hatali Disk - Acil Yedek + Degisim (Microsoft Support)
title.en: SMART Failing Disk - Urgent Backup + Replace (Microsoft Support)

risk_note.tr: SMART fiziksel donanim arizasi gosterir; D-Medic bu durumda yalnizca veri kurtarma yonlendirmesi yapabilir. Microsoft alintisi: yedek almak ICIN gec olmadan harekete gec. Bu rehberin Microsoft kismi yedek alma yontemleridir; disk degisimi vendor/donanim islemi.
risk_note.en: SMART indicates physical hardware failure; D-Medic can only direct you to data recovery. Microsoft message: take a backup BEFORE it's too late. This guide's Microsoft portion is backup methods; disk replacement is vendor/hardware work.

body.tr: Microsoft 'Choose a backup solution in Windows' belgesi 3 ana yol sunar: (a) Windows Backup app - dosyalar + temalar + ayarlar + uygulamalar + Wi-Fi. (b) OneDrive klasor yedegi (Desktop, Documents, Pictures) - PC otomatik bulut. (c) File History - klasik dosya snapshot harici diske.
body.en: Microsoft 'Choose a backup solution in Windows' lists 3 paths: (a) Windows Backup app - files + themes + settings + apps + Wi-Fi. (b) OneDrive folder backup (Desktop, Documents, Pictures) - PC to cloud. (c) File History - classic file snapshots to external drive.

title.tr: OneDrive klasor yedegi (en hizli, internet varsa)

body.tr: OneDrive icon (system tray) > Settings veya gear > Sync and backup > Manage backup. Desktop, Documents, Pictures klasorlerini secip Save changes. Microsoft 5 GB ucretsiz; daha buyuk veri icin abonelik veya File History.
body.en: OneDrive icon (system tray) > Settings or gear > Sync and backup > Manage backup. Select Desktop, Documents, Pictures, Save changes. Microsoft offers 5 GB free; larger data requires subscription or File History.

title.tr: File History (harici disk yedegi - sik degisen dosyalar icin)
title.en: File History (external drive backup - frequently changing files)

body.tr: Settings > Update & Security > Backup > Add a drive > harici diski sec. 'Back up my files' acik. Microsoft: dosyalar uzun donem birden cok versiyon korunur, dolayisi ile yanlislikla silmede de geri yuklenir.
body.en: Settings > Update & Security > Backup > Add a drive > pick external drive. 'Back up my files' on. Microsoft: files kept long-term with versions, restores even from accidental deletion.

steps.command: Get-PhysicalDisk | Select FriendlyName, MediaType, HealthStatus, OperationalStatus; Get-StorageReliabilityCounter -PhysicalDisk (Get-PhysicalDisk) | Format-List

body.tr: Microsoft minimum: 64 GB Win11 (gercek kullanim icin 256 GB+). Tip secimi: NVMe SSD ideal (hizli, sessiz), SATA SSD ekonomik, HDD sadece yedek arsiv icin. Marka onerileri (vendor): Samsung, Crucial (Micron), WD, Seagate, Kingston. 5 yil garanti standart.
body.en: Microsoft minimum: 64 GB Win11 (realistic 256 GB+). Type: NVMe SSD ideal (fast, silent), SATA SSD economical, HDD only for backup archive. Vendor brands: Samsung, Crucial (Micron), WD, Seagate, Kingston. 5-year warranty standard.

title.tr: Sistem diski klonlama (vendor araclari, Microsoft DEGIL)
title.en: System disk cloning (vendor tools, NOT Microsoft)

body.tr: Microsoft sistem disk klonlama icin resmi arac sunmaz - 3rd party gerekli. Vendor araclari: Samsung Data Migration (Samsung SSD), Acronis True Image (Crucial/WD lisansli surum), Macrium Reflect Free, Clonezilla. Klonlama yapildiktan sonra fiziksel disk degisimi.
body.en: Microsoft does not offer official system-disk cloning - 3rd party required. Vendor tools: Samsung Data Migration (Samsung SSD), Acronis True Image (Crucial/WD licensed version), Macrium Reflect Free, Clonezilla. After clone, physical disk swap.

body.tr: Klonlama yerine: yedek al > yeni diske Windows 11 temiz kur > dosyalari geri yukle. Microsoft destekli yol budur. clean-install-win11 rehberine bak.
body.en: Instead of cloning: back up > clean install Windows 11 on new disk > restore files. This is the Microsoft-supported path. See clean-install-win11 guide.
